creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text: Installing ports/math/gmm and using it results in compiler errors due to a strange remnant 'SRC' in the path of inlcuded files found in 'gmm_superlu_interface.h'. Removing 'SRC/'-portion in all occurrences results in a working header file. This error is sticky since a couple of deka-monts now.
